title: Senior Pilates Instructor
description:
At Absolute, we stand for love, family and diversity. Built on the foundation of supporting personal growth - physically, mentally and emotionally - Absolute is the place where change begins. We are always looking for dynamic individuals who would like to inject their creative flair into the fitness & wellness industry!

We are looking for Senior Pilates Instructor to join our team of growing Pilates Instructors. He/ She will not only teach both group and privates classes and sessions, but also help to lead and mentor the Pilates team to achieve excellence.


Job Description:

  • Instruct and teach group classes across all studios;
  • Carry out private sessions with individual/ duet clients to help them achieve their health and fitness goals;
  • Recruit and mentor new instructors;
  • Assist to create and develop learning programme for the team;
  • Improve the calibre and quality of teaching across all studios;
  • Involve in the quarterly and yearly review of the team;
  • Assist in overall class planning and work with studio operations to have suitable class types and timings across all studios;
  • Developing new class types and conduct training to the team;
  • Lead, motivate and develop the team;
  • Be engaged with our members community, supporting and promoting events with the team;


Requirements:

  • Fully Certified by any International Pilates body/ institution.
  • At least 10 years teaching pilates, with at least 3 years leading a team of instructors.
  • Passionate about improving the health and movements of clients.
  • Trained to work with different populations, special conditions and injuries.
  • It would be a strong advantage if the candidate possesses certification in relation to physical therapy or physiotherapy.
  • Possess strong leadership and good communications skills.
  • Ability to develop internal programmes/ workshops.


If you think you have what it takes and would like to help clients move and live better, send in your resume!

postedCompany.description: Absolute You is Singapore's First Boutique Fitness experience. The first interntional flagship studio of the Absolute You brand, Thailand's leading provider of Fitness & Wellness, our studio offers unique exercise experiences. A  pioneer in the 360 degress fitness solution in Asia our core programs are Yoga, Pilates reformer and Rhythm Cycling. The inventor of the Pilates Reformer Group Experience and first to bring the real New York rhythm cycling experience, Absolute You will evolve you to the best you.
postedCompany.name: ABSOLUTE YOU SG PTE. LTD.
